From Tools/rbw/rbtckk_KickTires.sh: rbtckk_false, rbtckk_true
From Tools/rbw/rbtcal_ArkLifecycle.sh: rbtcal_lifecycle
From Tools/buk/butcde_DispatchExercise.sh: butcde_burv_isolation, butcde_evidence_created, butcde_exit_capture

From Tools/rbw/rbtcsj_SrjclJupyter.sh: rbtcsj_jupyter_connectivity, rbtcsj_jupyter_running, rbtcsj_websocket_kernel
From Tools/rbw/rbtcpl_PlumlDiagram.sh: rbtcpl_http_headers, rbtcpl_invalid_hash, rbtcpl_local_diagram, rbtcpl_malformed_diagram, rbtcpl_text_rendering
From Tools/buk/butcvu_XnameValidation.sh: butcvu_debug, butcvu_xname_defaults, butcvu_xname_empty_optional, butcvu_xname_env_wrapper, butcvu_xname_invalid_chars, butcvu_xname_invalid_start, butcvu_xname_length, butcvu_xname_valid
From Tools/rbw/rbtcim_ImageManagement.sh: rbtcim_github_workflow, rbtcim_image_info

For each source file, grep for the function definitions (pattern: "functionname()") and report which enrolled names are MISSING. Be thorough - check every single one.

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.

    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBTCNS - Nsproto security test cases for RBTB testbench
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→######################################################################
    24→# Test Cases - nsproto security tests
    25→#
    26→# Ported from rbt_testbench.sh test_nsproto_* functions
    27→# Pattern: buto_unit_expect_ok = success expected, buto_unit_expect_fatal = failure expected
    28→# Use _i variants for commands that read stdin (dig, traceroute, apt-get)
    29→
    30→#--- Basic network verification ---
    31→
    32→rbtcns_basic_dnsmasq() {
    33→  # Verify dnsmasq is running on sentry
    34→  buto_unit_expect_ok rbtb_exec_sentry ps aux
    35→  rbtb_exec_sentry ps aux | grep -q dnsmasq || buto_fatal "dnsmasq not running on sentry"
    36→}
    37→
    38→rbtcns_basic_ping_sentry() {
    39→  # Censer can ping sentry within enclave
    40→  buto_unit_expect_ok rbtb_exec_censer ping "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" -c 2
    41→}
    42→
    43→rbtcns_basic_iptables() {
    44→  # Verify RBM-INGRESS chain exists
    45→  buto_unit_expect_ok rbtb_exec_sentry iptables -L RBM-INGRESS
    46→}
    47→
    48→#--- DNS allow/block tests ---
    49→
    50→rbtcns_dns_allow_anthropic() {
    51→  buto_unit_expect_ok rbtb_exec_bottle nslookup anthropic.com
    52→}
    53→
    54→rbtcns_dns_block_google() {
    55→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle nslookup google.com
    56→}
    57→
    58→#--- TCP 443 connection tests ---
    59→
    60→rbtcns_tcp443_allow_anthropic() {
    61→  # Get anthropic IP from sentry (which can resolve anything)
    62→  local z_ip
    63→  z_ip=$(rbtb_exec_sentry_i dig +short anthropic.com | head -1)
    64→  test -n "${z_ip}" || buto_fatal "Failed to resolve anthropic.com"
    65→  buto_unit_expect_ok rbtb_exec_bottle nc -w 2 -zv "${z_ip}" 443
    66→}
    67→
    68→rbtcns_tcp443_block_google() {
    69→  # Get google IP from sentry, then verify bottle cannot connect
    70→  local z_ip
    71→  z_ip=$(rbtb_exec_sentry_i dig +short google.com | head -1)
    72→  test -n "${z_ip}" || buto_fatal "Failed to resolve google.com"
    73→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle nc -w 2 -zv "${z_ip}" 443
    74→}
    75→
    76→#--- DNS protocol tests ---
    77→
    78→rbtcns_dns_nonexist() {
    79→  # Non-existent domain should fail with NXDOMAIN
    80→  local z_output
    81→  z_output=$(rbtb_exec_bottle nslookup nonexistentdomain123.test 2>&1 || true)
    82→  echo "${z_output}" | grep -q NXDOMAIN || buto_fatal "Expected NXDOMAIN in output: ${z_output}"
    83→}
    84→
    85→rbtcns_dns_tcp() {
    86→  # DNS over TCP should work for allowed domains
    87→  buto_unit_expect_ok rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig +tcp anthropic.com
    88→}
    89→
    90→rbtcns_dns_notcp() {
    91→  # DNS over UDP should work for allowed domains
    92→  buto_unit_expect_ok rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig +notcp anthropic.com
    93→}
    94→
    95→#--- DNS security tests (block bypass attempts) ---
    96→
    97→rbtcns_dns_block_direct() {
    98→  # Cannot query external DNS directly
    99→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @8.8.8.8 anthropic.com
   100→  # Cannot connect to external DNS port
   101→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle nc -w 2 -zv 8.8.8.8 53
   102→}
   103→
   104→rbtcns_dns_block_altport() {
   105→  # Cannot use alternate DNS ports
   106→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @8.8.8.8 -p 5353 example.com
   107→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @8.8.8.8 -p 443 example.com
   108→}
   109→
   110→rbtcns_dns_block_cloudflare() {
   111→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @1.1.1.1 example.com
   112→}
   113→
   114→rbtcns_dns_block_quad9() {
   115→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @9.9.9.9 example.com
   116→}
   117→
   118→rbtcns_dns_block_zonetransfer() {
   119→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @8.8.8.8 example.com AXFR
   120→}
   121→
   122→rbtcns_dns_block_ipv6() {
   123→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @2001:4860:4860::8888 example.com
   124→}
   125→
   126→rbtcns_dns_block_multicast() {
   127→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @224.0.0.251 -p 5353 example.local
   128→}
   129→
   130→rbtcns_dns_block_spoofing() {
   131→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i dig @8.8.8.8 +nsid example.com -b 192.168.1.2
   132→}
   133→
   134→rbtcns_dns_block_tunneling() {
   135→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle nc -z -w 1 8.8.8.8 53
   136→}
   137→
   138→#--- Package management test ---
   139→
   140→rbtcns_block_packages() {
   141→  # apt-get update should fail (cannot reach package repos)
   142→  buto_unit_expect_fatal rbtb_exec_bottle_i timeout 5 apt-get -qq update
   143→}
   144→
   145→#--- ICMP tests ---
   146→
   147→rbtcns_icmp_sentry_only() {
   148→  # First hop should be sentry (podman) or blocked (Docker)
   149→  # Both are acceptable - key is traffic routes through sentry
   150→  local z_output
   151→  z_output=$(rbtb_exec_bottle_i traceroute -I -m 1 8.8.8.8 2>&1)
   152→  # Accept either sentry IP visible OR fully blocked (* * *)
   153→  if echo "${z_output}" | grep -q "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}"; then
   154→    : # Sentry responded (podman behavior)
   155→  elif echo "${z_output}" | grep -qE "^\s*1\s+\* \* \*"; then
   156→    : # Blocked at first hop (Docker behavior - more restrictive)
   157→  else
   158→    buto_fatal "Unexpected traceroute output (expected sentry IP or * * *): ${z_output}"
   159→  fi
   160→}
   161→
   162→rbtcns_icmp_block_beyond() {
   163→  # Second hop should timeout (blocked)
   164→  local z_output
   165→  z_output=$(rbtb_exec_bottle_i traceroute -I -m 2 8.8.8.8 2>&1)
   166→  echo "${z_output}" | grep -qE "^[[:space:]]*2[[:space:]]+\* \* \*" || \
   167→    buto_fatal "Expected blocked second hop (* * *) in traceroute: ${z_output}"
   168→}
   169→
   170→# eof
   171→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBTCAL - Ark lifecycle test cases for RBTB testbench
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→######################################################################
    24→# Private helpers
    25→
    26→# zrbtcal_count_locators - Count locator lines from captured list output
    27→# Locator lines are `moniker:tag` with no spaces; skip "Repository:" header
    28→zrbtcal_count_locators() {
    29→  grep -cE '^[^[:space:]:]+:[^[:space:]]+$' "$1" || echo 0
    30→}
    31→
    32→######################################################################
    33→# Ark lifecycle integration test
    34→#
    35→# 6-step sequence: list(baseline) → conjure → list(verify+1) → retrieve → delete → list(verify=baseline)
    36→# Exercises RBZ zipper dispatch against live GCP environment.
    37→#
    38→# Expects ZRBTB_ARK_VESSEL_SIGIL to contain vessel sigil (set by setup function).
    39→
    40→rbtcal_lifecycle() {
    41→  # Resolve vessel directory from global setup variable
    42→  local z_vessel_sigil="${ZRBTB_ARK_VESSEL_SIGIL:-}"
    43→  test -n "${z_vessel_sigil}" || buto_fatal "No vessel sigil - ZRBTB_ARK_VESSEL_SIGIL empty (setup function must set this)"
    44→  local z_vessel_dir="rbev-vessels/${z_vessel_sigil}"
    45→  test -d "${z_vessel_dir}" || buto_fatal "Vessel directory not found: ${z_vessel_dir}"
    46→  buto_info "Vessel: ${z_vessel_sigil} at ${z_vessel_dir}"
    47→  local z_step z_status
    48→
    49→  # Step 1: Capture baseline image list
    50→  buto_section "Step 1/6: Listing images (baseline)"
    51→  local z_baseline_file="${BUT_TEMP_DIR}/rbtcal_list_baseline.txt"
    52→  buto_dispatch "${RBZ_LIST_IMAGES}" > "${z_baseline_file}"
    53→  z_step=$(buto_last_step_capture)
    54→  z_status=$(buto_get_step_exit_capture "$z_step")
    55→  buto_fatal_on_error "$z_status" "dispatch failed" "Colophon: ${RBZ_LIST_IMAGES}"
    56→  local z_baseline_count
    57→  z_baseline_count=$(zrbtcal_count_locators "${z_baseline_file}")
    58→  buto_info "Baseline locator count: ${z_baseline_count}"
    59→
    60→  # Step 2: Conjure ark
    61→  buto_section "Step 2/6: Conjuring ark from vessel ${z_vessel_sigil}"
    62→  buto_dispatch "${RBZ_CONJURE_ARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
    63→  z_step=$(buto_last_step_capture)
    64→  z_status=$(buto_get_step_exit_capture "$z_step")
    65→  buto_fatal_on_error "$z_status" "dispatch failed" "Colophon: ${RBZ_CONJURE_ARK}"
    66→
    67→  # Step 3: Verify image count increased
    68→  buto_section "Step 3/6: Listing images (post-conjure)"
    69→  local z_post_conjure_file="${BUT_TEMP_DIR}/rbtcal_list_post_conjure.txt"
    70→  buto_dispatch "${RBZ_LIST_IMAGES}" > "${z_post_conjure_file}"
    71→  z_step=$(buto_last_step_capture)
    72→  z_status=$(buto_get_step_exit_capture "$z_step")
    73→  buto_fatal_on_error "$z_status" "dispatch failed" "Colophon: ${RBZ_LIST_IMAGES}"
    74→  local z_post_conjure_count
    75→  z_post_conjure_count=$(zrbtcal_count_locators "${z_post_conjure_file}")
    76→  buto_info "Post-conjure locator count: ${z_post_conjure_count}"
    77→  test "${z_post_conjure_count}" -gt "${z_baseline_count}" \
    78→    || buto_fatal "Locator count did not increase: baseline=${z_baseline_count} post=${z_post_conjure_count}"
    79→
    80→  # Harvest new locators by diffing baseline vs post-conjure
    81→  local z_new_locators_file="${BUT_TEMP_DIR}/rbtcal_new_locators.txt"
    82→  comm -13 \
    83→    <(grep -E '^[^[:space:]:]+:[^[:space:]]+$' "${z_baseline_file}" | sort) \
    84→    <(grep -E '^[^[:space:]:]+:[^[:space:]]+$' "${z_post_conjure_file}" | sort) \
    85→    > "${z_new_locators_file}"
    86→  local z_new_count
    87→  z_new_count=$(wc -l < "${z_new_locators_file}" | tr -d ' ')
    88→  test "${z_new_count}" -gt 0 || buto_fatal "No new locators found after conjure"
    89→  buto_info "New locators (${z_new_count}):"
    90→  buto_info "$(cat "${z_new_locators_file}")"
    91→
    92→  # Step 4: Retrieve image using first new locator
    93→  buto_section "Step 4/6: Retrieving image"
    94→  local z_retrieve_locator
    95→  z_retrieve_locator=$(head -1 "${z_new_locators_file}")
    96→  test -n "${z_retrieve_locator}" || buto_fatal "No locator available for retrieve"
    97→  buto_info "Retrieving: ${z_retrieve_locator}"
    98→  buto_dispatch "${RBZ_RETRIEVE_IMAGE}" "${z_retrieve_locator}"
    99→  z_step=$(buto_last_step_capture)
   100→  z_status=$(buto_get_step_exit_capture "$z_step")
   101→  buto_fatal_on_error "$z_status" "dispatch failed" "Colophon: ${RBZ_RETRIEVE_IMAGE}"
   102→
   103→  # Step 5: Delete all new locators to restore baseline
   104→  buto_section "Step 5/6: Deleting new images"
   105→  while IFS= read -r z_locator; do
   106→    buto_info "Deleting: ${z_locator}"
   107→    buto_dispatch "${RBZ_DELETE_IMAGE}" "${z_locator}" "--force"
   108→    z_step=$(buto_last_step_capture)
   109→    z_status=$(buto_get_step_exit_capture "$z_step")
   110→    buto_fatal_on_error "$z_status" "dispatch failed" "Colophon: ${RBZ_DELETE_IMAGE}"
   111→  done < "${z_new_locators_file}"
   112→
   113→  # Step 6: Verify count restored to baseline
   114→  buto_section "Step 6/6: Listing images (post-delete)"
   115→  local z_post_delete_file="${BUT_TEMP_DIR}/rbtcal_list_post_delete.txt"
   116→  buto_dispatch "${RBZ_LIST_IMAGES}" > "${z_post_delete_file}"
   117→  z_step=$(buto_last_step_capture)
   118→  z_status=$(buto_get_step_exit_capture "$z_step")
   119→  buto_fatal_on_error "$z_status" "dispatch failed" "Colophon: ${RBZ_LIST_IMAGES}"
   120→  local z_final_count
   121→  z_final_count=$(zrbtcal_count_locators "${z_post_delete_file}")
   122→  buto_info "Final locator count: ${z_final_count}"
   123→  test "${z_final_count}" -eq "${z_baseline_count}" \
   124→    || buto_fatal "Count not restored: baseline=${z_baseline_count} final=${z_final_count}"
   125→
   126→  buto_success "Ark lifecycle test passed"
   127→}
   128→
   129→# eof
   130→

    29→#--- Helper function to invoke RBIM with proper environment ---

    31→zrbtcim_invoke_rbim() {

    34→
    35→  # Generate timestamp for this RBIM invocation

    39→  BURD_TEMP_DIR="${z_rbg_temp_dir}"                            \
    40→  BURD_NOW_STAMP="${z_rbg_now_stamp}"                          \
    41→  RBG_RUNTIME="podman"                                        \
    42→  RBG_RUNTIME_ARG="--connection=${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}"  \
    43→    "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbim_cli.sh"                          \
    44→    "${z_rbim_command}" "$@"
    45→}

    47→#--- GitHub workflow integration test ---
    48→
    49→rbtcim_github_workflow() {
    50→  local z_recipe_file="${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../test/trbim_dockerfile.recipe"
    51→  test -f "${z_recipe_file}" || buto_fatal "Recipe file not found: ${z_recipe_file}"
    52→
    53→  # Create subdirectories for each RBIM operation

    55→  local z_build_dir="${BUT_TEMP_DIR}/build"

    59→  local z_list3_dir="${BUT_TEMP_DIR}/list_after"
    60→
    61→  mkdir -p "${z_list1_dir}" "${z_build_dir}" "${z_list2_dir}" \
    62→           "${z_retrieve_dir}" "${z_delete_dir}" "${z_list3_dir}"
    63→
    64→  buto_info "Step 1: List registry images before build"
    65→  buto_unit_expect_ok zrbtcim_invoke_rbim "${z_list1_dir}" rbim_list
    66→
    67→  buto_info "Step 2: Build container from recipe"

    70→  buto_unit_expect_ok zrbtcim_invoke_rbim "${z_build_dir}" rbim_build "${z_recipe_file}"
    71→
    72→  test -f "${z_fqin_file}" || buto_fatal "FQIN output file not created: ${z_fqin_file}"
